title: galium mollugo subsp. mollugo
intro: Galium mollugo subsp. mollugo, also known as the sweet woodruff, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Galium mollugo subsp. mollugo include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Galium mollugo subsp. mollugo is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for medicinal purposes, and it can also be used as a natural flavoring agent in food and beverages.
